trigger_eval.method: manual prediction (HOUSECARL_SKILL_AUTHORING.md §6.5 fallback; empirical run_loop needs a non-Windows host, session is Windows 11)
trigger_eval.followup: Flagged for empirical run_loop re-validation on a non-Windows host + one independent peer prediction check (§6.5 items 3-4). Tracked in STATE.md Phase-4 notes.

round_trip.method: Creature, exact: blind-derive TrollFrostRace (013206) from the normal-troll analogue TrollRace (013205) + the trait-structure rule (armor shared across variants; resist/healing per-variant), then diff vs the houseCARL winner.
round_trip.target: TrollFrostRace (013206:Skyrim.esm), winner Authoria - Master Patch - Races Merge.esp

predicted.ActorEffect_structure: Armor_Troll (shared) + a frost-specific Resist + a frost-specific Healing
predicted.Keywords: identical to normal troll [ActorTypeCreature, ActorTypeAnimal, ActorTypeTroll, REQ_DropsBloodKeyword, REQ_MinorKnockdownImmunity]
predicted.stats: read from the variant (a frost troll is tankier than a normal troll)

round_trip.notes: Trait STRUCTURE reproduced exactly: natural Armor is shared across troll variants (Armor_Troll on both normal and frost), while Resist and Healing are per-variant (*_TrollFrost). Keyword set and the RegenHpInCombat flag identical to the normal troll. Stat numbers (H750 vs the normal troll's H300; U65 vs U60) are the variant's own Requiem tuning and must be read live, not inferred. Requiem.esp is identical-to-winner -- the Master Patch carries Requiem's troll faithfully.

round_trip.method: Creature classification (the new-race case): classify the modded Wendigo Troll (zzzRevWendigoTrollRace 2E02F7:Glenmoril.esm, winner = its own mod, the Reqtificator does not recognize it) and confirm the trait set + Layer-B perk match the config.

predicted.add_spells: REQ_Trait_Armor_Troll AD39E6 + REQ_Trait_Healing_Troll AE3AED; do NOT add Resist (it ships its own)
predicted.layer_B_perk: physique.fur 000805 (Resist and Regen Tweak) for the NPC phase

actual.ships_own_ability: ActorEffect[0] = zzzLrhAbBeastPos 0079A5 -- an Ab-prefixed ability bundle (6 effects) = its own resistances -> keep it, only add armor
actual.config_check: troll is in the Resist-and-Regen-Tweak fur race_any list (013205/013206/0117F4/0117F5); base Requiem perks no troll, so fur 000805 is the correct Layer-B perk
actual.missing: no RegenHpInCombat flag, UnarmedDamage 35 (vanilla, not Requiem's 60)

round_trip.notes: Confirms the Ab-convention rule live: the Wendigo ships zzzLrhAbBeastPos (Ab-prefixed) -> keep its own resistances, add only Armor + Healing(+flag). Confirms the new-race gap: override_depth 1 (no Requiem override), so its NPCs get no Layer-B perk from the auto-pass -> name fur 000805 for the NPC-phase pass (template-onto-troll or hand-add).

round_trip.method: Playable: blind-derive RedguardRace (013748) ability bundle from the family pattern + the standard, then diff vs the live winner (tests how much is predictable vs must-read-live).
round_trip.target: RedguardRace (013748:Skyrim.esm), winner Authoria - Master Patch - Races Merge.esp

predicted.ActorEffect: universal NoHealthRegeneration 609AF0 + MassEffect 82CC14 + Heritage_Redguard + Blood (ResistDisease + ResistPoison per Races.md intent)

actual.skill_boosts: OneHanded +10, TwoHanded +10, LightArmor +10, Archery +5, Block +5, Smithing +5

round_trip.notes: The ability-spell BUNDLE was predicted exactly (universal + Heritage_Redguard + the two Blood resistances). But BOTH the attributes (doc 130/60/120 vs live 100/80/120) AND the skill boosts (doc +15 OneHanded vs live +10 OneHanded/+10 TwoHanded/+10 LightArmor) drift from Races.md -- Races Redone retuned them. Lesson, baked into the skill: clone the bundle by family pattern, but read every NUMBER (attributes, regen, skill boosts) from the live comparable, never from the doc.
